title: vitex sprucei var. longidentata
intro: Vitex sprucei var. longidentata, also known as Chinese chaste tree or Vitex longidentata, is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family, native to China. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating menstrual disorders, anxiety, and insomnia. The health benefits of Vitex sprucei var. longidentata are attributed to its ability to regulate hormonal imbalances, improve mood, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules for its therapeutic benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
